caption: A man with glasses and a large, peaked grey wig sits in a recording studio, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt with suspenders and a bow tie. He wears over-ear headphones and speaks into a black professional microphone positioned to his left. The background features a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and a garment rack with clothes. To his left, on-screen text reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST," accompanied by a microphone icon. To his right, the text "BOSS TALK 101" appears. As the scene progresses, the man continues to talk, his mouth moving and his facial expressions shifting slightly. In the final sequence, he raises his right hand into the frame, gesturing as he speaks. Throughout the clip, the camera remains stationary, focusing on the man from the chest up.
